chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.124 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.1241/2018 17.02.2026 Mr. Saad Fayaz, Advocate for the appellant Mr. Asad Sherwani Advocate. Under instructions learned counsel states that the appeal may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
